title: OpenCoworkAI/open-codesign

title: RyanMMU/ebee-conquest
summary: Turn-Based Sandbox Grand Strategy War Simulator with Procedural Events & NPC Enemies

title: HallyK/auto_compact_daemon
summary: When using graphify using compact costs large amounts of tokens based on the length of the conversation. This is a backdoor fix to the compact issue, instead of using claude to write the compact to graphiffy, this daemon uses Ollama on your local GPU to summarize the exact same text, but for free. Offloading the text in a .md file.

title: tenseleyFlow/DocumentLanguageModel
summary: A text file becomes your personal, locally-trained LLM. LoRA/QLoRA on a pretrained base, replay-based retraining, exportable to Ollama. 100% local, no telemetry.
